step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("effectiveness of ultrasound guidance in internal jugular vein cannulation")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

(Only two sentences max.)
Then state your clear answer choice using \boxed{} format.
Ultrasound guidance significantly improves the accuracy and safety of internal jugular vein cannulation by providing real-time visualization of the vessel, reducing risks associated with missed placements or accidental injury to adjacent structures like the carotid artery. Multiple sources explicitly note that ultrasound helps locate the vein, confirms successful cannulation, and ensures safe navigation around surrounding anatomy—an advantage over reliance on physical landmarks alone. Therefore, I fully agree with the original conclusion.
